task_context.original_task: Navigate to /claude-manager page without creating automatic Claude instances
task_context.claude_solution: Automatic initialization in useEffect with empty dependency array should run once

user_feedback.feedback_text: Claude instances were created automatically every time someone navigated to /claude-manager
user_feedback.corrected_solution: Removed automatic initialization from useEffect, made initialization user-controlled with explicit button

failure_analysis.root_cause: React StrictMode caused double execution of useEffect hook that automatically called createProductionFeedIntegration() and feedService.initialize()
